AvailabilityRecord.description: Accessibility check result for a single artifact URL.

title.description: Title of the paper whose artifact URL was checked.
examples: Understanding and Detecting Software Upgrade Failures in Distributed Systems
title.title: Title

url_key.description: URL field name from the source data, e.g. 'repository_url', 'artifact_url'.
url_key.title: Url Key

url.description: The artifact URL that was checked, e.g. 'https://github.com/org/repo'.
url.title: Url

accessible.description: True if the URL returned HTTP 200 at check time, false otherwise.
accessible.title: Accessible

AvailabilityRecord.title: AvailabilityRecord

AvailabilitySummary.description: Aggregate summary of artifact URL accessibility.

checked_at.description: UTC timestamp when the availability check was run, e.g. '2026-04-27 21:27:11 UTC'.
checked_at.title: Checked At

total_urls.description: Total number of artifact URLs checked across all platforms.
total_urls.title: Total Urls

accessible_urls.description: Number of URLs that were accessible (HTTP 200).
accessible_urls.title: Accessible Urls

by_platform.description: Breakdown by hosting platform. Keys are platform names: 'GitHub', 'GitLab', 'Zenodo', 'Figshare', 'Bitbucket', 'DOI-other'.
by_platform.title: By Platform

by_year.description: Breakdown by publication year. Keys are year strings, e.g. '2020', '2023'.
by_year.title: By Year

by_year_area.description: Nested breakdown: year string → area ('systems'/'security') → PlatformStats.
by_year_area.title: By Year Area

by_year_platform.description: Nested breakdown: year string → platform name → PlatformStats.
by_year_platform.title: By Year Platform

by_conference.description: Breakdown by conference. Keys are abbreviations, e.g. 'OSDI', 'USENIXSEC', 'NDSS'.
by_conference.title: By Conference

AvailabilitySummary.title: AvailabilitySummary

PlatformStats.description: Accessibility stats for a single platform.

total.description: Total number of artifact URLs checked on this platform.
total.title: Total

accessible.description: Number of URLs that returned HTTP 200 (accessible).
accessible.title: Accessible

PlatformStats.title: PlatformStats

description: Artifact URL accessibility report: aggregate summary and per-URL check results.

summary.description: Aggregate accessibility summary with breakdowns by platform, area, year, and conference.

records.description: Individual check results, one record per artifact URL tested.
records.title: Records

title: ArtifactAvailability
